---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new detection rule, policy option, or integration
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-paragraph description of the feature and the threat or use-case it addresses.

## Motivation

What attack technique or operational need drives this? Link CVEs, package names,
or incident reports if available.

## Proposed approach

How would you implement this? Note which files would change and whether it
requires editing any of the 7 self-hashed engine files (if so, `.helios-baseline`
must be regenerated — see CONTRIBUTING.md).

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you rule out, and why?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
